GOLD TESTING KIT METHOD: This gold testing method is best used on gold that is yet to be smelted, due to the harsh nature of the solution, that could potentially damage an already finished item; if testing fine jewelry or other finished gold items, be sure to choose an inconspicuous spot, so as not to compromise the finished piece. HOW THE GOLD TESTING KIT WORKS: To test gold karat content and purity, scratch the item onto the test stone leaving a visible deposit, then place a small drop of the solution over top of deposit; if the gold is the same karat or higher, the solution will not affect the deposit; if the deposit is of a lower karat, the deposit will dissolve and eventually disappear; ensure gold testing stone has been thoroughly washed before completing any testing!

short_description: Whether you're new to gold panning or are an experienced gold prospector, you know how important it is to be able to successfully and efficiently classify your raw material down to usable paydirt, either for panning or to run through a sluice box to find gold nuggets, gems or other. narrative: Whether you're new to gold panning or are an experienced gold prospector, you know how important it is to be able to successfully and efficiently classify your raw material down to usable paydirt, either for panning or to run through a sluice box to find gold nuggets, gems or other. The ASR Outdoor collapsible bucket, collapsible stand and classifier screen does just this in just a few easy steps! The ASR Outdoor collapsible bucket has been designed to work seamlessly with the included ASR Outdoor sifting pan; together they make a an efficient classification system that is easy to set up and take down, lightweight and reliable. The collapsible bucket is a lightweight alternative to a traditional 5 gallon bucket, which can be heavy and cumbersome to use, as well as carry to and from your gold claim site. To use the bucket and stand combo, you simply slide the four arms into the base and rotate until they lock in place. Then place the collapsible bucket over the tops of the arms and secure. Next, add your sifter and you're ready to start classifying your raw material. The classifier screen we've included in this gold panning kit is made from high impact, durable ABS plastic and will stand up to lots of gold prospecting equipment wear and tear. This sifting screens will allow you to classify down material to usable paydirt, removing larger unwanted materials like rocks and gravels, leaving you with just sand, fine gravels and hopefully gold nuggets! And, as mentioned, the sifters are designed to be stacked on top of the collapsible bucket for quick and efficient processing of unclassified paydirt. The collapsible bucket is made from BPA free silicone, features a sturdy carrying handle, bottom finger indentation and water pouring channel; the bucket can also be employed for tons of other uses outside of gold panning kits like fishing, gardening, as an ice bucket, for camping and much more. Lastly, a handy mesh bag is included to make carrying the collapsible bucket and stand components easier, while allowing for tidy and organized storage when you're not utilizing your gold prospecting equipment to ensure none of the pieces are lost (does not fit the classifier screen). The collapsible bucket with stand is space saving, compact and lightweight in design, and overall a useful and versatile tool to include with your gold prospecting equipment.
